name: @metorial/hystruct
description: Extract structured data from websites using AI-powered web scraping. Create and trigger scraping jobs for existing workflows, retrieve extracted data shaped by user-defined schemas, and manage webhook subscriptions for real-time event notifications. Supports multi-page scraping (loops) for listing pages, schema-based extraction with field types like String, Number, Boolean, Date, and Array, and asynchronous job processing for crawling sub-pages.
